After years of repeated denials, my VA benefits had stalled. Despite having service-connected injuries that were valid and mostly documented, I couldn’t break through. I had exhausted every effort to navigate the system on my own—but I didn’t speak the VA’s language.
That’s when I reached out to Legal Help for Veterans.
From the beginning, I was met with professionalism and compassion. I shared my history and explained everything I’d tried. I was assigned to Briannia, a case manager who was patient, understanding, and genuinely committed to helping me. I broke down often—but she never wavered. Her positivity and determination made me feel supported and seen.
It wasn’t easy, and it didn’t happen overnight. But Legal Help for Veterans kept fighting. We became a team. And together, we won.
If you’re pursuing service connection, a higher rating, or justice after years of delay, Legal Help for Veterans knows how to work through the bureaucracy for what you’ve earned. Their commitment goes beyond paperwork, they restore dignity and secure the benefits you deserve.
“I finally got the rating I deserved, 100% Permanent and Total.”
— USMC Veteran

I've been a client of LHFV since 2010 for a case that I had clear evidence for, but was unable to win either alone or with the DAV after many years.

Not only have lawyers Kristina Derro & Todd Tetreault, along with their support staff, been able to pursue those claims, they've won repeatedly. They've also been helpful with additional service-related issues when they became problematic as I've aged. In addition, as my representatives, they were able to deal with the tinnitus I got after a VA medication error in 2021.

I'm nearing the end of this years-long saga that has included the VA appropriately granting service connection for 15 separate issues, most of which started in the 80's or 90's. One final issue is before the circuit court, where LHFV has represented me when the VA didn't respond properly to several claims over the years, often by not following their own rules. LHFV knew what to do for every item, and never missed a step.

What LHFV has done for me has truly kept me on the right side of the dirt.  It's largely a blur for me because I've been able to work on getting/keeping my life together while they did all of the heavy lifting. I can't imagine pursuing my case without them, while also having numerous surgeries, hundreds of physical therapy and related mental health appointments, and dealing with a barrage of other issues related to my service. I'm eternally grateful, as is my family.
